title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED EIGHTY-FIVE BY TRANSFERRING THE BRANCH OF THE PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF FISHERIES TECHNOLOGY FROM BUTUAN CITY TO BARRIO MATABAO, MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1764 / 65 OG No. 9, 2069 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5018, June 16, 1967 ]

AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED EIGHTY-FIVE BY TRANSFERRING THE BRANCH OF THE PHILIPPINE INSTITUTE OF FISHERIES TECHNOLOGY FROM BUTUAN CITY TO BARRIO MATABAO, MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (b) of sub-paragraph ten, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Six hundred eighty-five is hereby amended to read as follows:

(b) Matabao, Buenavista, Agusan P50,000"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
